productDisplayName: Puma Men's Deccan Chargers Red T-shirt
description: Composition100% cotton round neck t-shirt in red with bold team branding at the front and puma branding at the front and backWash care Normal action 40 degree Wash dark colours separately Normal tumble dry Reverse iron on print Warn the opposition to keep at bay in this red fan wear t-shirt of the Deccan Chargers. Made of 100% cotton, this tee keeps you dry and comfortable all through the IPL season this summer with the charging bull in white and a bold print of Chargers below it spread across the chest exuding power and energy. Cheer the former IPL champs to another big victory in this tee.
